title: stelis globiflora
intro: Stelis globiflora, also known as the globeflower orchid, is a type of flowering orchid native to tropical regions in Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis globiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
